title: Dynamic Trees - Oh The Biomes We've Gone
description: Compatibility mod between Dynamic Trees and Oh The Biomes We've Gone
body:
![Banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1193/967/oh_the_biomes_weve_gone-png.png)

[![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/0Prkr13.png)](https://discord.gg/A4FCBS3) [![Forge](https://i.imgur.com/oeSBh9T.png)](https://files.minecraftforge.net)

## Overview
This mod makes Oh The Biomes We've Gone compatible with Dynamic Trees, adding dynamically growing versions of trees added by said mod, and fully replacing them during world generation.
The trees, their behaviour and their generation can be customized and tweaked through the use of Tree Packs.

For 1.19 and before, use [Oh The Biomes You'll Go](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomesyougo) with [Dynamic Trees - BYG](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-trees-byg).

## Features
### Currently Included Trees
- Aspen
- Baobab
- Poplar
- Yellow Poplar
- Blue Enchanted Tree
- Green Enchanted Tree
- White Sakura
- Yellow Sakura
- Cika
- Cypress
- Ebony
- Fir
- Holly
- Jacaranda
- Indigo Jacaranda
- Mahogany
- White Mangrove
- Maple
- Red Maple
- Silver Maple
- Palm
- Palo Verde
- Pine
- Araucaria
- Rainbow Eucalyptus
- Redwood
- Skyris
- Willow
- Witch Hazel
- Zelkova
- Brown Zelkova
- Yucca Tree
- Orchard
- Blue Spruce
- Orange Spruce
- Red Spruce
- Yellow Spruce
- Ironwood Tree
- Firecracker Bush
### Currently Included Mushrooms
- Green Mushroom
- Wood Blewit
- Weeping Milkcap
### Currently Included Giant Flowers
- Giant Allium
- Giant Pink Allium
- Giant White Allium
- Giant Rose

### World Gen
Dynamic Trees generate all over the overworld BWG biomes!

## Other addons
Addons for other mods can be found in the [Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees) page.
### Suggestions and Requests
To request a new mod for compatibility please do it [Github Discussions](https://github.com/orgs/DynamicTreesTeam/discussions/categories/compatibility-addon-suggestions).

## Requirements
- [Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees)
- [Dynamic Trees Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictreesplus)
- [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone)

## License, Permission and Modpacks
Permission is hereby granted to use this mod in ANY mod pack or server. Please don't ask for permission to You can use this in any mod pack you'd like! No need to ask.
This mod has an MIT license and its source is public on github.
